LegalPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
LegalPrivacy.metaDescription: How GTX GAMING collects, uses, and stores your information when you use our digital games store.
LegalPrivacy.intro: GTX GAMING (“we”, “us”) respects your privacy. This policy describes what data we collect, why we collect it, and your choices. By using our website, you agree to this policy together with our Terms of Service.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body:
We may collect: (a) account and order data you provide (e.g. email at checkout, payment method selection, order details); (b) technical data such as browser type, device type, and approximate location derived from IP; (c) communications you send to us (e.g. support messages).

We do not require an account to browse the catalog. Checkout data is used only to process and support your order.

sections.heading: 2. Cookies and similar technologies
sections.body: We use cookies and local storage where necessary to operate the store (e.g. shopping cart, language, security). With your consent, we may use additional cookies for analytics or marketing as described in our cookie banner. You can change your preferences anytime via “Cookie settings” in the footer.

sections.heading: 3. How we use your data
sections.body: We use data to: fulfil and support orders; communicate about your purchase; improve our website and product offering; comply with law; detect and prevent fraud or abuse; and, where you have opted in, send relevant offers or measure site performance.

sections.heading: 4. Sharing and processors
sections.body: We may share data with service providers who help us run the store (e.g. hosting, payment display, product suppliers/platforms such as digital key distributors). They may only process data on our instructions. We may disclose information if required by law or to protect our rights and users’ safety.

sections.heading: 5. Retention and security
sections.body: We keep order and support records for as long as needed for legal, tax, and customer-support purposes, then delete or anonymise them where appropriate. We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your data; no online transmission is 100% secure.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
sections.body: Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, or to object to certain processing. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details on the Contact page. You may also withdraw consent for optional cookies via the cookie banner.

sections.heading: 7. Children
sections.body: Our services are not directed at children under the age required to enter into a contract in your country. If you believe we have collected data from a child inappropriately, please contact us and we will take steps to delete it.

sections.heading: 8. Changes
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. The “Last updated” date at the top will change when we do. Continued use of the site after changes means you accept the updated policy.

LegalTerms.title: Terms of Service
LegalTerms.metaDescription: Terms governing purchases and use of the GTX GAMING digital storefront.
LegalTerms.intro: These Terms of Service (“Terms”) apply to your use of the GTX GAMING website and any purchase of digital products or services we offer. Please read them carefully before ordering.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are
sections.body: GTX GAMING operates an online store offering digital games, gift cards, software keys, and related digital goods, primarily for customers in Iraq. References to “you” mean the person using the site or placing an order.

sections.heading: 2. Eligibility and account
sections.body: You must be legally able to enter into a binding contract in your jurisdiction. You are responsible for providing accurate information at checkout (including a valid email). We may refuse or cancel orders that appear fraudulent or violate these Terms.

sections.heading: 3. Products and delivery
sections.body: Products are digital unless stated otherwise. Delivery is by digital means (e.g. key delivery, redemption instructions, or access via the platform indicated on the product page). Title and risk pass when the digital good is made available to you. Some products are subject to third-party platform rules (e.g. Steam, PlayStation, Xbox).

sections.heading: 4. Pricing, taxes, and payment
sections.body: Prices are shown in the currency selected where applicable and may include VAT or sales tax as indicated at checkout. Local payment methods are shown on the site. You agree to pay the total amount shown before completing your order. We may correct pricing errors before acceptance of the order.

sections.heading: 5. Orders and acceptance
sections.body: Your order is an offer to buy. We may confirm or reject orders (e.g. stock, supplier, or fraud checks). Order details and support communications may be sent to the email you provide.

sections.heading: 6. Refunds and chargebacks
sections.body: Digital products often cannot be “returned” once a key is revealed or delivered. Refunds may be offered where required by law or at our discretion when a product is defective or not as described. Contact support with your order ID. Abusive chargebacks may result in account or order restrictions.

sections.heading: 7. Prohibited use
sections.body: You may not use our site to break the law, infringe others’ rights, scrape or overload our systems, resell keys in violation of platform terms, or attempt to circumvent security or payment processes.

sections.heading: 8. Intellectual property
sections.body: Site content, branding, and software belong to GTX GAMING or its licensors. Product names and trademarks belong to their respective owners. A purchase grants you the rights granted by the product publisher/platform, not ownership of the underlying IP.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, or for loss of data or profits. Our total liability for any claim relating to an order is generally limited to the amount you paid for that order. Some jurisdictions do not allow certain limitations; in those cases, our liability is limited to the fullest extent permitted.

sections.heading: 10. Governing law and disputes
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws applicable in Iraq, without regard to conflict-of-law rules, unless mandatory consumer protections in your country say otherwise. Courts in Iraq may have jurisdiction unless otherwise required by law.

sections.heading: 11. Contact
sections.body: For questions about these Terms, use the contact details on our Contact page.

LegalGuarantee.title: GTX Guarantee
LegalGuarantee.metaDescription: Our commitment to genuine digital products and customer support.
LegalGuarantee.intro: We want every purchase from GTX GAMING to be straightforward and trustworthy. This page summarises what you can expect from us.

sections.heading: Authentic digital products
sections.body: We source keys and digital products from authorised distribution channels where possible. Product pages describe platform, region, and any restrictions (e.g. activation territory). Always read the product description before purchase.

sections.heading: Support after purchase
sections.body: If you have trouble redeeming a key or accessing a product, contact us with your order reference and a short description of the issue. We will help within a reasonable time, including coordinating with suppliers when needed.

sections.heading: When something goes wrong
sections.body: If a key is invalid or the product materially differs from what was advertised, we will work to replace it or offer a remedy in line with applicable law and our policies. Some cases depend on third-party platform policies beyond our control.

sections.heading: What the guarantee does not cover
sections.body: We are not responsible for loss caused by incorrect email, banned accounts, regional misuse, or violation of platform terms. Hardware, non-digital goods, and third-party fees are outside this guarantee unless explicitly stated on the product page.

LegalContact.title: Contact us
LegalContact.metaDescription: Reach GTX GAMING by email, phone, or social channels.
LegalContact.intro: For order support, product questions, or partnership enquiries, use the channels below. We aim to respond to messages as soon as possible during business hours.
LegalContact.socialNote: Replace the placeholder links in site settings with your official Instagram, Discord, and Telegram when ready.
LegalContact.closing: For legal or privacy requests, please include “Privacy” or “Legal” in the subject line so we can route your message correctly.

LegalFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
LegalFaq.metaDescription: Answers about orders, digital delivery, and payments at GTX GAMING.
LegalFaq.intro: Quick answers to common questions. For anything else, contact us.

items.q: How do I receive my game or key?
items.a: Digital products are delivered according to the instructions on the product page and in your order confirmation—usually by email or through your account flow on checkout. Keep your email address correct and check spam folders.
Where VAT or sales tax applies, prices on the storefront are shown including tax as configured for our store. Your cart and checkout summary show the breakdown when tax is enabled.

items.q: Which payment methods do you support?
items.a: We support local payment methods shown at checkout (e.g. bank transfer apps and wallets available in Iraq). Available methods may change; the checkout page always lists current options.

items.q: Can I cancel or refund a digital order?
items.a: Many digital products cannot be returned once the key is delivered or revealed. If there is a defect or the product does not match the description, contact support with your order ID and we will review your case.

items.q: What if my key does not work?
items.a: Contact us with your order number and a screenshot or error message. We will verify with the supplier and help with a replacement or fix where appropriate.

items.q: Do I need an account to shop?
items.a: You can browse the catalog without an account. Checkout requires the details needed to process your order (such as email for delivery and confirmations).

items.q: Is shopping on GTX GAMING secure?
items.a: We use industry-standard practices to protect our site and your data. Always use official payment instructions shown at checkout and avoid sharing codes or receipts with unknown parties.
